name: Primary Action Hierarchy Guideline 1
guidance: Design primary action hierarchy so users can understand state, recover from mistakes, and act without hidden instructions. Validate keyboard, mobile, and edge cases.

name: Smooth Scroll
guidance: Anchor links should scroll smoothly to target section. Do: Use scroll-behavior: smooth on html element. Avoid: Jump directly without transition. Severity: High.

details.Description: Anchor links should scroll smoothly to target section
details.Do: Use scroll-behavior: smooth on html element

name: Sticky Navigation
guidance: Fixed nav should not obscure content. Do: Add padding-top to body equal to nav height. Avoid: Let nav overlap first section content. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Fixed nav should not obscure content
details.Do: Add padding-top to body equal to nav height
details.Don't: Let nav overlap first section content

name: Active State
guidance: Current page/section should be visually indicated. Do: Highlight active nav item with color/underline. Avoid: No visual feedback on current location. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Current page/section should be visually indicated
details.Do: Highlight active nav item with color/underline
details.Don't: No visual feedback on current location

name: Back Button
guidance: Users expect back to work predictably. Do: Preserve navigation history properly. Avoid: Break browser/app back button behavior. Severity: High.

details.Description: Users expect back to work predictably

name: Deep Linking
guidance: URLs should reflect current state for sharing. Do: Update URL on state/view changes. Avoid: Static URLs for dynamic content. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: URLs should reflect current state for sharing

name: Breadcrumbs
guidance: Show user location in site hierarchy. Do: Use for sites with 3+ levels of depth. Avoid: Use for flat single-level sites. Severity: Low.

details.Description: Show user location in site hierarchy
details.Do: Use for sites with 3+ levels of depth

name: Excessive Motion
guidance: Too many animations cause distraction and motion sickness. Do: Animate 1-2 key elements per view maximum. Avoid: Animate everything that moves. Severity: High.

details.Description: Too many animations cause distraction and motion sickness
details.Do: Animate 1-2 key elements per view maximum

name: Duration Timing
guidance: Animations should feel responsive not sluggish. Do: Use 150-300ms for micro-interactions. Avoid: Use animations longer than 500ms for UI. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Animations should feel responsive not sluggish
details.Don't: Use animations longer than 500ms for UI

name: Reduced Motion
guidance: Respect user's motion preferences. Do: Check prefers-reduced-motion media query. Avoid: Ignore accessibility motion settings. Severity: High.

name: Loading States
guidance: Show feedback during async operations. Do: Use skeleton screens or spinners. Avoid: Leave UI frozen with no feedback. Severity: High.

details.Don't: Leave UI frozen with no feedback

name: Hover vs Tap
guidance: Hover effects don't work on touch devices. Do: Use click/tap for primary interactions. Avoid: Rely only on hover for important actions. Severity: High.

details.Description: Hover effects don't work on touch devices
details.Don't: Rely only on hover for important actions

name: Continuous Animation
guidance: Infinite animations are distracting. Do: Use for loading indicators only. Avoid: Use for decorative elements. Severity: Medium.

name: Transform Performance
guidance: Some CSS properties trigger expensive repaints. Do: Use transform and opacity for animations. Avoid: Animate width/height/top/left properties. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Some CSS properties trigger expensive repaints
details.Do: Use transform and opacity for animations

name: Easing Functions
guidance: Linear motion feels robotic. Do: Use ease-out for entering ease-in for exiting. Avoid: Use linear for UI transitions. Severity: Low.

details.Do: Use ease-out for entering ease-in for exiting

name: Z-Index Management
guidance: Stacking context conflicts cause hidden elements. Do: Define z-index scale system (10 20 30 50). Avoid: Use arbitrary large z-index values. Severity: High.

details.Description: Stacking context conflicts cause hidden elements

name: Overflow Hidden
guidance: Hidden overflow can clip important content. Do: Test all content fits within containers. Avoid: Blindly apply overflow-hidden. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Hidden overflow can clip important content
details.Do: Test all content fits within containers

name: Fixed Positioning
guidance: Fixed elements can overlap or be inaccessible. Do: Account for safe areas and other fixed elements. Avoid: Stack multiple fixed elements carelessly. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Fixed elements can overlap or be inaccessible
details.Do: Account for safe areas and other fixed elements
details.Code Example Good: Fixed nav + fixed bottom with gap

name: Stacking Context
guidance: New stacking contexts reset z-index. Do: Understand what creates new stacking context. Avoid: Expect z-index to work across contexts. Severity: Medium.

details.Do: Understand what creates new stacking context
details.Don't: Expect z-index to work across contexts

name: Content Jumping
guidance: Layout shift when content loads is jarring. Do: Reserve space for async content. Avoid: Let images/content push layout around. Severity: High.

details.Description: Layout shift when content loads is jarring

name: Viewport Units
guidance: 100vh can be problematic on mobile browsers. Do: Use dvh or account for mobile browser chrome. Avoid: Use 100vh for full-screen mobile layouts. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: 100vh can be problematic on mobile browsers
details.Do: Use dvh or account for mobile browser chrome

name: Container Width
guidance: Content too wide is hard to read. Do: Limit max-width for text content (65-75ch). Avoid: Let text span full viewport width. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Content too wide is hard to read
details.Don't: Let text span full viewport width

name: Touch Target Size
guidance: Small buttons are hard to tap accurately. Do: Minimum 44x44px touch targets. Avoid: Tiny clickable areas. Severity: High.

details.Description: Small buttons are hard to tap accurately

name: Touch Spacing
guidance: Adjacent touch targets need adequate spacing. Do: Minimum 8px gap between touch targets. Avoid: Tightly packed clickable elements. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Adjacent touch targets need adequate spacing

name: Gesture Conflicts
guidance: Custom gestures can conflict with system. Do: Avoid horizontal swipe on main content. Avoid: Override system gestures. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Custom gestures can conflict with system
details.Do: Avoid horizontal swipe on main content

name: Tap Delay
guidance: 300ms tap delay feels laggy. Do: Use touch-action CSS or fastclick. Avoid: Default mobile tap handling. Severity: Medium.

name: Pull to Refresh
guidance: Accidental refresh is frustrating. Do: Disable where not needed. Avoid: Enable by default everywhere. Severity: Low.

name: Haptic Feedback
guidance: Tactile feedback improves interaction feel. Do: Use for confirmations and important actions. Avoid: Overuse vibration feedback. Severity: Low.

details.Do: Use for confirmations and important actions

name: Focus States
guidance: Keyboard users need visible focus indicators. Do: Use visible focus rings on interactive elements. Avoid: Remove focus outline without replacement. Severity: High.

details.Description: Keyboard users need visible focus indicators
details.Do: Use visible focus rings on interactive elements

name: Hover States
guidance: Visual feedback on interactive elements. Do: Change cursor and add subtle visual change. Avoid: No hover feedback on clickable elements. Severity: Medium.

details.Do: Change cursor and add subtle visual change
details.Don't: No hover feedback on clickable elements

name: Active States
guidance: Show immediate feedback on press/click. Do: Add pressed/active state visual change. Avoid: No feedback during interaction. Severity: Medium.

name: Disabled States
guidance: Clearly indicate non-interactive elements. Do: Reduce opacity and change cursor. Avoid: Confuse disabled with normal state. Severity: Medium.

name: Loading Buttons
guidance: Prevent double submission during async actions. Do: Disable button and show loading state. Avoid: Allow multiple clicks during processing. Severity: High.

details.Description: Prevent double submission during async actions
details.Do: Disable button and show loading state

name: Error Feedback
guidance: Users need to know when something fails. Do: Show clear error messages near problem. Avoid: Silent failures with no feedback. Severity: High.

details.Description: Users need to know when something fails
details.Do: Show clear error messages near problem

name: Success Feedback
guidance: Confirm successful actions to users. Do: Show success message or visual change. Avoid: No confirmation of completed action. Severity: Medium.

details.Do: Show success message or visual change

name: Confirmation Dialogs
guidance: Prevent accidental destructive actions. Do: Confirm before delete/irreversible actions. Avoid: Delete without confirmation. Severity: High.

name: Color Contrast
guidance: Text must be readable against background. Do: Minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Avoid: Low contrast text. Severity: High.

details.Description: Text must be readable against background

name: Color Only
guidance: Don't convey information by color alone. Do: Use icons/text in addition to color. Avoid: Red/green only for error/success. Severity: High.

details.Description: Don't convey information by color alone
details.Do: Use icons/text in addition to color

name: Alt Text
guidance: Images need text alternatives. Do: Descriptive alt text for meaningful images. Avoid: Empty or missing alt attributes. Severity: High.

details.Do: Descriptive alt text for meaningful images

name: Heading Hierarchy
guidance: Screen readers use headings for navigation. Do: Use sequential heading levels h1-h6. Avoid: Skip heading levels or misuse for styling. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Screen readers use headings for navigation
details.Don't: Skip heading levels or misuse for styling

name: ARIA Labels
guidance: Interactive elements need accessible names. Do: Add aria-label for icon-only buttons. Avoid: Icon buttons without labels. Severity: High.

name: Keyboard Navigation
guidance: All functionality accessible via keyboard. Do: Tab order matches visual order. Avoid: Keyboard traps or illogical tab order. Severity: High.

details.Don't: Keyboard traps or illogical tab order

name: Screen Reader
guidance: Content should make sense when read aloud. Do: Use semantic HTML and ARIA properly. Avoid: Div soup with no semantics. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Content should make sense when read aloud
details.Do: Use semantic HTML and ARIA properly

name: Form Labels
guidance: Inputs must have associated labels. Do: Use label with for attribute or wrap input. Avoid: Placeholder-only inputs. Severity: High.

details.Do: Use label with for attribute or wrap input

name: Error Messages
guidance: Error messages must be announced. Do: Use aria-live or role=alert for errors. Avoid: Visual-only error indication. Severity: High.

details.Do: Use aria-live or role=alert for errors

name: Skip Links
guidance: Allow keyboard users to skip navigation. Do: Provide skip to main content link. Avoid: No skip link on nav-heavy pages. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Allow keyboard users to skip navigation
details.Do: Provide skip to main content link
details.Don't: No skip link on nav-heavy pages

name: Image Optimization
guidance: Large images slow page load. Do: Use appropriate size and format (WebP). Avoid: Unoptimized full-size images. Severity: High.

name: Lazy Loading
guidance: Load content as needed. Do: Lazy load below-fold images and content. Avoid: Load everything upfront. Severity: Medium.

details.Do: Lazy load below-fold images and content

name: Code Splitting
guidance: Large bundles slow initial load. Do: Split code by route/feature. Avoid: Single large bundle. Severity: Medium.

name: Caching
guidance: Repeat visits should be fast. Do: Set appropriate cache headers. Avoid: No caching strategy. Severity: Medium.

name: Font Loading
guidance: Web fonts can block rendering. Do: Use font-display swap or optional. Avoid: Invisible text during font load. Severity: Medium.

name: Third Party Scripts
guidance: External scripts can block rendering. Do: Load non-critical scripts async/defer. Avoid: Synchronous third-party scripts. Severity: Medium.

name: Bundle Size
guidance: Large JavaScript slows interaction. Do: Monitor and minimize bundle size. Avoid: Ignore bundle size growth. Severity: Medium.

name: Render Blocking
guidance: CSS/JS can block first paint. Do: Inline critical CSS defer non-critical. Avoid: Large blocking CSS files. Severity: Medium.

name: Input Labels
guidance: Every input needs a visible label. Do: Always show label above or beside input. Avoid: Placeholder as only label. Severity: High.

details.Description: Every input needs a visible label
details.Do: Always show label above or beside input

name: Error Placement
guidance: Errors should appear near the problem. Do: Show error below related input. Avoid: Single error message at top of form. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Errors should appear near the problem
details.Don't: Single error message at top of form

name: Inline Validation
guidance: Validate as user types or on blur. Do: Validate on blur for most fields. Avoid: Validate only on submit. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Validate as user types or on blur
details.Do: Validate on blur for most fields

name: Input Types
guidance: Use appropriate input types. Do: Use email tel number url etc. Avoid: Text input for everything. Severity: Medium.

details.Do: Use email tel number url etc

name: Autofill Support
guidance: Help browsers autofill correctly. Do: Use autocomplete attribute properly. Avoid: Block or ignore autofill. Severity: Medium.

name: Required Indicators
guidance: Mark required fields clearly. Do: Use asterisk or (required) text. Avoid: No indication of required fields. Severity: Medium.

name: Password Visibility
guidance: Let users see password while typing. Do: Toggle to show/hide password. Avoid: No visibility toggle. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Let users see password while typing

name: Submit Feedback
guidance: Confirm form submission status. Do: Show loading then success/error state. Avoid: No feedback after submit. Severity: High.

name: Input Affordance
guidance: Inputs should look interactive. Do: Use distinct input styling. Avoid: Inputs that look like plain text. Severity: Medium.

details.Don't: Inputs that look like plain text

name: Mobile Keyboards
guidance: Show appropriate keyboard for input type. Do: Use inputmode attribute. Avoid: Default keyboard for all inputs. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Show appropriate keyboard for input type

name: Mobile First
guidance: Design for mobile then enhance for larger. Do: Start with mobile styles then add breakpoints. Avoid: Desktop-first causing mobile issues. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Design for mobile then enhance for larger
details.Do: Start with mobile styles then add breakpoints

name: Breakpoint Testing
guidance: Test at all common screen sizes. Do: Test at 320 375 414 768 1024 1440. Avoid: Only test on your device. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Test at all common screen sizes

name: Touch Friendly
guidance: Mobile layouts need touch-sized targets. Do: Increase touch targets on mobile. Avoid: Same tiny buttons on mobile. Severity: High.

name: Readable Font Size
guidance: Text must be readable on all devices. Do: Minimum 16px body text on mobile. Avoid: Tiny text on mobile. Severity: High.

details.Description: Text must be readable on all devices

name: Viewport Meta
guidance: Set viewport for mobile devices. Do: Use width=device-width initial-scale=1. Avoid: Missing or incorrect viewport. Severity: High.

name: Horizontal Scroll
guidance: Avoid horizontal scrolling. Do: Ensure content fits viewport width. Avoid: Content wider than viewport. Severity: High.

name: Image Scaling
guidance: Images should scale with container. Do: Use max-width: 100% on images. Avoid: Fixed width images overflow. Severity: Medium.

name: Table Handling
guidance: Tables can overflow on mobile. Do: Use horizontal scroll or card layout. Avoid: Wide tables breaking layout. Severity: Medium.

details.Do: Use horizontal scroll or card layout

name: Line Height
guidance: Adequate line height improves readability. Do: Use 1.5-1.75 for body text. Avoid: Cramped or excessive line height. Severity: Medium.

name: Line Length
guidance: Long lines are hard to read. Do: Limit to 65-75 characters per line. Avoid: Full-width text on large screens. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Long lines are hard to read

name: Font Size Scale
guidance: Consistent type hierarchy aids scanning. Do: Use consistent modular scale. Avoid: Random font sizes. Severity: Medium.

name: Font Loading
guidance: Fonts should load without layout shift. Do: Reserve space with fallback font. Avoid: Layout shift when fonts load. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Fonts should load without layout shift

name: Contrast Readability
guidance: Body text needs good contrast. Do: Use darker text on light backgrounds. Avoid: Gray text on gray background. Severity: High.

details.Do: Use darker text on light backgrounds

name: Heading Clarity
guidance: Headings should stand out from body. Do: Clear size/weight difference. Avoid: Headings similar to body text. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Headings should stand out from body

name: Loading Indicators
guidance: Show system status during waits. Do: Show spinner/skeleton for operations > 300ms. Avoid: No feedback during loading. Severity: High.

name: Empty States
guidance: Guide users when no content exists. Do: Show helpful message and action. Avoid: Blank empty screens. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Guide users when no content exists

name: Error Recovery
guidance: Help users recover from errors. Do: Provide clear next steps. Avoid: Error without recovery path. Severity: Medium.

name: Progress Indicators
guidance: Show progress for multi-step processes. Do: Step indicators or progress bar. Avoid: No indication of progress. Severity: Medium.

name: Toast Notifications
guidance: Transient messages for non-critical info. Do: Auto-dismiss after 3-5 seconds. Avoid: Toasts that never disappear. Severity: Medium.

name: Confirmation Messages
guidance: Confirm successful actions. Do: Brief success message. Avoid: Silent success. Severity: Medium.

name: Truncation
guidance: Handle long content gracefully. Do: Truncate with ellipsis and expand option. Avoid: Overflow or broken layout. Severity: Medium.

details.Do: Truncate with ellipsis and expand option

name: Date Formatting
guidance: Use locale-appropriate date formats. Do: Use relative or locale-aware dates. Avoid: Ambiguous date formats. Severity: Low.

name: Number Formatting
guidance: Format large numbers for readability. Do: Use thousand separators or abbreviations. Avoid: Long unformatted numbers. Severity: Low.

name: Placeholder Content
guidance: Show realistic placeholders during dev. Do: Use realistic sample data. Avoid: Lorem ipsum everywhere. Severity: Low.

name: User Freedom
guidance: Users should be able to skip tutorials. Do: Provide Skip and Back buttons. Avoid: Force linear unskippable tour. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Users should be able to skip tutorials

name: Autocomplete
guidance: Help users find results faster. Do: Show predictions as user types. Avoid: Require full type and enter. Severity: Medium.

name: No Results
guidance: Dead ends frustrate users. Do: Show 'No results' with suggestions. Avoid: Blank screen or '0 results'. Severity: Medium.

name: Bulk Actions
guidance: Editing one by one is tedious. Do: Allow multi-select and bulk edit. Avoid: Single row actions only. Severity: Low.

details.Description: Editing one by one is tedious

name: Disclaimer
guidance: Users need to know they talk to AI. Do: Clearly label AI generated content. Avoid: Present AI as human. Severity: High.

details.Description: Users need to know they talk to AI

name: Streaming
guidance: Waiting for full text is slow. Do: Stream text response token by token. Avoid: Show loading spinner for 10s+. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Waiting for full text is slow
details.Do: Stream text response token by token

name: Gaze Hover
guidance: Elements should respond to eye tracking before pinch. Do: Scale/highlight element on look. Avoid: Static element until pinch. Severity: High.

details.Description: Elements should respond to eye tracking before pinch

name: Depth Layering
guidance: UI needs Z-depth to separate content from environment. Do: Use glass material and z-offset. Avoid: Flat opaque panels blocking view. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: UI needs Z-depth to separate content from environment

name: Auto-Play Video
guidance: Video consumes massive data and energy. Do: Click-to-play or pause when off-screen. Avoid: Auto-play high-res video loops. Severity: Medium.

details.Description: Video consumes massive data and energy

name: Asset Weight
guidance: Heavy 3D/Image assets increase carbon footprint. Do: Compress and lazy load 3D models. Avoid: Load 50MB textures. Severity: Medium.

name: Feedback Loop
guidance: AI needs user feedback to improve. Do: Thumps up/down or 'Regenerate'. Avoid: Static output only. Severity: Low.

details.Description: AI needs user feedback to improve

name: Motion Sensitivity
guidance: Parallax/Scroll-jacking causes nausea. Do: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Avoid: Force scroll effects. Severity: High.
